title: SiTime Q4 2022 Earnings - Solid Performance Amid Macro Challenges
text: SiTime had a solid fourth quarter with revenue for the quarter of $60.8 million and revenue for 2022 of $283.6 million. This represented 30% growth over the previous year even though the second half of 2022 was challenging. SiTime beat earnings estimates, reporting quarterly earnings of $0.64 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.55 per share. Non-GAAP income was $14.4 million for the quarter and $82.9 million for the year, which is 29% of revenue. In Q4 2022, design wins grew 55% over the same period in 2021. The company introduced four new products and was on track to introduce five more in 2023. Management noted that while they had solid Q4 results, the macro environment remained challenging with customers working through excess inventory.
